entries.source: Important events, facts learned, and uncertainty notes stay visible.
entries.value: Dhacdooyinka muhiimka ah, xaqiiqooyinka la bartay, iyo qoraallada hubanti-la'aanta ayaa sii ahaanaya kuwo muuqda.

entries.source: In 4 sentences, explain how one assumption change moves revenue, cash flow, and value. Name one thing you would check before trusting it.
entries.value: 4 jumladood, ku sharrax sida isbeddelka hal mala-awaal uu u dhaqaajiyo dakhliga, qulqulka lacagta, iyo qiimaha. Magacow hal shay oo aad hubin lahayd ka hor inta aadan ku kalsoonaan.

entries.source: Increase the challenge. Have the historical person defend their worldview more forcefully while the historian tracks weak claims.
entries.value: Kordhi caqabadda. Qofka taariikhiga ah ha ku difaaco aragtidiisa adduunka si xoog leh halka taariikhyahan uu raadinayo sheegashooyinka daciifka ah.

entries.source: Individual crowd interactions are plausible composites
entries.value: Isdhexgalka dadka ee gaarka ah waa isku-dhafan la aamini karo

entries.source: Individual routes through smoke are plausible, not exact
entries.value: Waddooyinka gaarka ah ee dhex mara qiiqa waa kuwo la aamini karo, ma aha kuwo sax ah

entries.source: Interpret the target internally and begin immediately with a real diagnostic question.
entries.value: U fasir bartilmaameedka gudaha oo ku bilow isla markiiba su'aal ogaansho dhab ah.

entries.source: Invite a figure into the room.
It definitely rises because sales are higher.
entries.value: Xaqiiqdii way kor u kacdaa sababtoo ah iibku waa ka sarreeyaa.

entries.source: It helps you explain profit potential, not just market size.
entries.value: Waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad sharaxdo awoodda faa'iidada, ee ma aha oo kaliya cabbirka suuqa.

entries.source: It helps you predict policy, taxes, shortages, and market reactions without memorizing diagrams.
entries.value: Waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad saadaaliso siyaasadda, canshuuraha, yaraanta, iyo falcelinta suuqa adigoon xifdin jaantusyada.

entries.source: It is impossible to know anything until terminal value is calculated.
entries.value: Suurtagal maaha in la ogaado wax kasta ilaa qiimaha kama dambaysta ah la xisaabiyo.

entries.source: It lets you revise for logic, not just polish wording.
entries.value: Waxay kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad dib u eegis ku samayso caqli-galnimada, ee ma aha oo kaliya inaad hagaajiso ereyada.

entries.source: It makes you faster because each test either proves or removes a hypothesis.
entries.value: Waxay kaa dhigaysaa mid degdeg ah sababtoo ah imtixaan kastaa wuxuu caddeeyaa ama meesha ka saaraa mala-awaal.

entries.source: It may fall because costs and working capital can absorb the sales gain.
entries.value: Waxaa laga yaabaa inay hoos u dhacdo sababtoo ah kharashyada iyo raasumaalka shaqadu waxay nuugi karaan faa'iidada iibka.

entries.source: Jumps to valuation before reading the operating model.
entries.value: Wuxuu u boodaa qiimaynta ka hor inta uusan akhrin qaabka hawlgalka.
Kashmere Gate waxay ahayd mid muhiim u ah dhinaca militariga

entries.source: Keep governance, money, labor, technology, and culture in view.
entries.value: Hays maamulka, lacagta, shaqada, tignoolajiyada, iyo dhaqanka.

entries.source: Keep the sidecar quieter unless something needs correction.
entries.value: Ka dhig dhinaca gaadhiga mid aamusan ilaa ay wax u baahdaan sixitaan.

entries.source: Kingdom of England under Charles II
entries.value: Boqortooyadii Ingiriiska ee hoos tagta Charles II

entries.source: Kingdom of France in revolutionary crisis
entries.value: Boqortooyadii Faransiiska oo ku jirta dhibaato kacaan
Luqadda iyo dharka oo tilmaamaya khatar
Dib-u-eegis nolosha dambe ah ka hor dhimashada

entries.source: Learn how they thought, worked, planned, wrote, governed, or experimented.
entries.value: Baro sida ay u fikiri jireen, u shaqayn jireen, u qorshayn jireen, u qori jireen, u maamuli jireen, ama u tijaabin jireen.

entries.source: Learn supply and demand by working through examples
entries.value: Baro sahayda iyo baahida adiga oo ka shaqaynaya tusaalooyin
Xaaladda sharciga ah oo qaabaysay nolosha maalinlaha ah

entries.source: List what has to be true for the idea to work.
entries.value: Liis garee waxa ay tahay inay run noqdaan si fikraddu u shaqayso.

entries.source: Listing the five labels without judging their strength does not explain whether the industry is attractive.
entries.value: Liis gareynta shanta calaamadood adigoon qiimayn xooggooda ma sharxayso in warshaduhu ay soo jiidasho leeyihiin iyo in kale.

entries.source: Literate helper near records, letters, or multilingual exchange
entries.value: Kaaliye wax-qori kara oo u dhow diiwaannada, warqadaha, ama is-weydaarsiga luqadaha badan
Qof wax-qori kara oo aan ka tirsanayn dadka sare

entries.source: Livres, sous, bread prices as daily pressure
entries.value: Livres, sous, qiimaha rootiga oo ah cadaadis maalinle ah

entries.source: Local working language with class-appropriate fluency
entries.value: Luuqadda shaqada ee maxalliga ah oo leh aqoon ku habboon fasalka

entries.source: Lock useful notes only after the idea has been used.
entries.value: Quful qoraallada waxtarka leh kaliya ka dib marka fikradda la isticmaalo.

entries.source: Look for the causal link. Which variable actually changed, and what does it affect next?
entries.value: Raadi xiriirka sababta. Waa maxay doorsoomaha dhab ahaan isbeddelay, maxayse saameynaysaa xiga?

entries.source: Make the first rough structure before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes."
entries.value: Samee qaab-dhismeedka koowaad ee qallafsan ka hor intaadan talo bixin. Ku bilow: "Waxaan sameeyay qaab-dhismeedka koowaad ee qallafsan. Wax kasta beddel. Waan ka falcelin doonaa isbeddelladaada."

entries.source: Manipulation proves you can use the model, not just repeat it.
entries.value: Wax-ka-qabashadu waxay caddaynaysaa inaad isticmaali karto qaabka, ee ma aha oo kaliya inaad ku celceliso.

entries.source: Map allies, enemies, critics, patrons, and pressure groups around this person at this moment.
entries.value: Khariidadda xulafada, cadawga, dhaleeceeyayaasha, taageerayaasha, iyo kooxaha cadaadiska ee ku xeeran qofkan wakhtigan.

entries.source: Market street near Chandni Chowk during the siege
entries.value: Waddada suuqa ee u dhow Chandni Chowk intii lagu jiray go'doominta

entries.source: market, household, workshop, port, school, or neighborhood
entries.value: suuq, guri, aqoon-isweydaarsi, deked, dugsi, ama xaafad

entries.source: Markets move when incentives change. Demand captures willingness to buy, supply captures willingness to sell, and price is where the pressure balances.
entries.value: Suuqyadu way dhaqaaqaan marka dhiirigelintu isbedesho. Baahidu waxay qabataa rabitaanka wax iibsiga, sahayduna waxay qabataa rabitaanka wax iibinta, qiimuhuna waa meesha cadaadiska lagu dheellitiro.
Suuqyadu waxay ku shaqeeyaan albaabo wakhtaysan

entries.source: Markets, homes, workshops, courts, maps, and decision points.
entries.value: Suuqyada, guryaha, aqoon-isweydaarsiyada, maxkamadaha, khariidadaha, iyo meelaha go'aan qaadashada.
Arday MBA ah oo baranaya naqshadaynta hay'adaha

entries.source: Merge the accepted changes into a clean current version, then update the decision log and open questions.
entries.value: Isku dar isbeddellada la aqbalay nooc nadiif ah oo hadda jira, ka dibna cusboonaysii diiwaanka go'aanka iyo su'aalaha furan.
David ee Michelangelo waxaa la rakibay 1504

entries.source: Misses become a smaller review deck
entries.value: Wixii la seegay waxay noqdaan xirmo dib-u-eegis oo yar

entries.source: Missing the curfew or ignoring official rank can quickly become dangerous.
entries.value: In la seego bandowga ama la iska indho-tiro darajada rasmiga ah waxay si dhakhso ah u noqon kartaa mid khatar ah.
Mitosis, aagagga cimilada, falalka aan caadiga ahayn...
Wuxuu isku daraa beddelka iyo beddelka tooska ah.

entries.source: Modern assumptions about equal citizenship would be immediately out of place.
entries.value: Fikradaha casriga ah ee ku saabsan muwaadinimada loo siman yahay waxay noqon lahaayeen kuwo aan meesha oollin.

entries.source: Modern talk of individual artistic genius can sound naive without patronage, guild, and civic context.
entries.value: Hadalka casriga ah ee ku saabsan hibada farshaxannimo ee shakhsi ahaaneed wuxuu u dhawaaqi karaa mid nacasnimo ah iyada oo aan lahayn taageero, urur, iyo macnaha guud ee madaniga ah.

entries.source: More immersive, with tighter limits on what you can know and say.
entries.value: Mid aad u qoto dheer, oo leh xaddidaadyo adag oo ku saabsan waxa aad ogaan karto oo aad dhihi karto.

entries.source: Move carefully and notice ordinary life before judging.
entries.value: Si taxadar leh u dhaqaaq oo fiirso nolosha caadiga ah ka hor inta aanad xukumin.

entries.source: Move one control, watch the result, then explain why the output changed.
entries.value: Dhaqaaq hal kontorool, daawo natiijada, ka dibna sharax sababta wax soo saarku u isbeddelay.
U dhaqaaq dhanka isku-darka kama dambaysta ah
Dhaqdhaqaaqu wuxuu u baahan yahay hawl la aamini karo

entries.source: Moving every control at once makes it hard to know what caused the result.
entries.value: In la dhaqaajiyo kontorool kasta hal mar waxay ka dhigaysaa mid adag in la ogaado waxa sababay natiijada.

entries.source: Moving on after recognition instead of testing recall and transfer.
entries.value: In la sii wado ka dib aqoonsiga halkii laga tijaabin lahaa xusuusta iyo wareejinta.
Boqortooyada Mughal ee hoos timaada Akbar

entries.source: Mughal symbolic authority under rebel control, contested by the East India Company
entries.value: Awoodda calaamadeed ee Mughal oo hoos timaada xakamaynta fallaagada, oo ay kula tartamayso Shirkadda East India

entries.source: Multiple explanations can help, but the proof is what you can do after reading.
entries.value: Sharaxaadaha badan ayaa caawin kara, laakiin caddayntu waa waxa aad samayn karto akhrinta ka dib.

entries.source: Name the input you changed, the immediate effect, and the final result.
entries.value: Magacow waxa aad beddeshay, saamaynta degdegga ah, iyo natiijada kama dambaysta ah.

entries.source: Name the topic and your current guess. The app builds a ladder of questions, hints, evidence, and synthesis.
entries.value: Magacow mawduuca iyo qiyaastaada hadda. App-ku wuxuu dhisaa sallaan su'aalo, tilmaamo, caddayn, iyo isku-dubarid.

entries.source: Napoleon after Austerlitz, Ambedkar in the Constitution committee...
entries.value: Napoleon ka dib Austerlitz, Ambedkar oo ku jira guddiga Dastuurka...

entries.source: Near Akbar's imperial complex and debate spaces
entries.value: Meel u dhow xarunta boqortooyada Akbar iyo goobaha doodaha
Nelson Mandela oo ka hadlaya geesinimada
Ma jiro jawaab ka timid kaaliyaha
Weli wax farqi ah oo cad lama calaamadin.

entries.source: No full answer unless you ask.
entries.value: Ma jiro jawaab dhammaystiran ilaa aad weydiiso.
Ma jiro fikrad khaldan oo weyn oo sii jirta.
Weli wax qoraallo ah lama kaydin.
Weli ma jiro fikrad khaldan oo sii jirta.
Aan ahayn kuwa darajada sare laakiin bulsho ahaan la aqoonsan karo

entries.source: Nothing changes unless buyers' tastes change.
entries.value: Waxba isma beddelaan ilaa dhadhanka iibsadayaashu isbeddelaan.
Saraakiishu waxay gacanta ku hayaan nidaamka suuqa

entries.source: Olive oil, dust, bronze, public argument, and the uneasy pride of a wounded democracy.
entries.value: Saliid saytuun, boodh, naxaas, dood dadweyne, iyo sharaf-darro aan raaxo lahayn oo dimuqraadiyad dhaawacan.

entries.source: One short concept chunk at a time, with examples that fit your level.
entries.value: Hal fikrad oo kooban markiiba, oo leh tusaalooyin ku habboon heerkaaga.

entries.source: One targeted question tests the current understanding.
entries.value: Hal su'aal oo la beegsaday ayaa tijaabinaysa fahamka hadda.

entries.source: One tight arrival, three discoveries, and a debrief stamp.
entries.value: Hal imaatin oo kooban, saddex daahfur, iyo shaabad dib-u-eegis ah.

entries.source: Open the evidence drawer. Label high-confidence facts, plausible reconstructions, contested claims, and things you must not fabricate.
entries.value: Fur khaanadda caddaynta. Calaamadee xaqiiqooyinka kalsoonida sare leh, dib-u-dhiska macquulka ah, sheegashooyinka la isku haysto, iyo waxyaabaha aadan been-abuurin karin.

entries.source: Open the Historical Person mini app as a staged historical audience with a living dossier.
entries.value: Fur barnaamijka yar ee Qofka Taariikhiga ah sida dhagaystayaal taariikhi ah oo leh fayl nool.

entries.source: Openings that produce a better encounter.
entries.value: Furitaanno soo saara kulan ka wanaagsan.
Waxay wanaajisaa soo bandhigidda ka hor doodda macquulka ah.

entries.source: Optional: paste notes, syllabus points, or facts to prioritize
entries.value: Ikhtiyaari: dheji qoraallada, qodobbada manhajka, ama xaqiiqooyinka si aad mudnaanta u siiso
Jilayaasha caadiga ah waa isku-dhafan caddayn-og
Wadahadallada caadiga ah waa isku-dhafan macquul ah

entries.source: Ordinary reactions are plausible blends of legal and literary evidence
entries.value: Falcelinta caadiga ah waa isku-dhafan macquul ah oo caddayn sharci iyo suugaaneed ah
Hadalka caadiga ah waa dib-u-dhis xilliga ku salaysan
Ostia waxay u adeegtay nidaamka sahayda ee Rooma

entries.source: Out-of-time observer with a discreet field guide
entries.value: Goobjooge waqti ka baxsan oo wata hage qarsoodi ah
Paris waxay ahayd mid siyaasad ahaan kacsan

entries.source: Paste an article, case, or passage

entries.value: Dharka ku habboon xilliga oo lala jaanqaaday heerka bulsho
Af-Faarisi oo ku jira diiwaannada sare

entries.source: Pick any topic. I will build 10 multiple-choice questions and score you as you go.
entries.value: Dooro mawduuc kasta. Waxaan kuu diyaarin doonaa 10 su'aalood oo doorashooyin badan leh, waxaana ku siin doonaa dhibco inta aad socoto.

entries.source: Piety is civic, not private only
entries.value: Cibaadadu waa mid madani ah, ee ma aha mid gaar ah oo keliya

entries.source: Plain respectable dress with writing tools
entries.value: Dharka caadiga ah ee xushmadda leh oo ay weheliyaan qalabka wax lagu qoro

entries.source: Plausible ordinary life should be labelled as reconstruction
entries.value: Nolosha caadiga ah ee macquulka ah waa in loo calaamadeeyaa dib-u-dhis

entries.source: Point attention to the relevant part.
Political language can mobilize or endanger
entries.value: Luqadda siyaasadeed waxay kicin kartaa ama khatar gelin kartaa
Khalkhal suurtagal ah: qiimo vs kharash

entries.source: Possible gap: short run vs long run
entries.value: Farqi suurtagal ah: muddada gaaban marka loo eego muddada dheer
Dhibaatada suurtagalka ah: xiriirka vs sababta

entries.source: Precise sensory mix at a given stall
entries.value: Isku-darka dareenka saxda ah ee goob gaar ah

entries.source: Preferred setting: choose a historically fitting room, court, battlefield tent, study, prison, salon, workshop, public square, or other concrete place.
entries.value: Dejinta la doorbiday: dooro qol taariikh ahaan ku habboon, maxkamad, teendho dagaal, goob waxbarasho, xabsi, salon, aqoon-isweydaarsi, fagaare dadweyne, ama meel kale oo la taaban karo.

entries.source: Prepare for a class discussion on Tata's acquisition of JLR
entries.value: U diyaar garow dood fasalka ku saabsan iibsashada Tata ee JLR

entries.source: Printer's ink, sweat, bread queues, ironwork, and a city discovering its own force.
entries.value: Kallinka daabacaadda, dhididka, safafka rootida, shaqada birta, iyo magaalo ogaanaysa awoodeeda.
Dhiirigelin gaar ah oo aan lahayn diiwaanno
Dhiirigelin gaar ah oo ka dambeeya siyaasad kasta
Go'aannada hantida iyo badbaadada ayaa isku dhacaya
Qof dibadda ah oo la ilaaliyo
Hadalka dadweynaha wuxuu leeyahay miisaan kooxeed

entries.source: Pudding Lane as fire begins to spread
entries.value: Pudding Lane markii dabku bilaabay inuu faafo

entries.source: Pudding Lane is associated with the outbreak
entries.value: Pudding Lane waxay la xiriirtaa dillaaca

entries.source: Question prompts that deepen the exchange without turning it into a lecture.
entries.value: Su'aalo dhiirigelin ah oo qoto dheeraynaya is-weydaarsiga iyada oo aan loo beddelin muxaadaro.
Su'aalaha ku saabsan daacadnimada waa kuwo khatar ah
